results.rendered_html:
avahita p. p.
1 Deposited, placed.
2 Attentive, careful; śṛṇuta manobhiravahitaiḥ  V. 1. 2 ; śṛṇu me'vahitā vacaḥ  Rām. ;  Me. 100. 
3 Clebrated, known; ˚tā application, attention.
Comp.
— aṃjali a. with joined hands.
